steps.title: Read the line features
steps.content: The equation $y=2x-5$ is in slope-intercept form. The slope is $2$, and the $y$-intercept is $(0,-5)$.

steps.title: Match the graph
steps.content: The correct graph must cross the $y$-axis at $-5$ and rise $2$ units for every $1$ unit to the right. The graph with those features is the correct one. The answer is D.
